task_completion.description: Verify the correct portfolio file is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'growth_portfolio' in the Portfolio Performance application title bar or active tab.

task_completion.description: Verify Alphabet Inc Class A was added to the portfolio.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Alphabet Inc Class A' in the 'All Securities' list. The ticker 'GOOGL' and ISIN 'US02079K3059' should be visible in the security details or list columns.

task_completion.description: Verify the BUY transaction details are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Buy' transaction dialog or ledger entry showing Date: '2024-03-10', Shares: '15', Price: '140.00' (or Total Value: '2,100.00'), and Fees: '9.99'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct accounts are selected for the transaction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Buy dialog or transaction details, look for Securities Account set to 'Main Brokerage' and Cash Account set to 'Main Brokerage (USD)'.

task_completion.description: Verify the transaction is finalized and the portfolio is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the completed transaction in the account ledger or 'Statement of Assets'. Ensure there is no asterisk (*) next to 'growth_portfolio' in the tab name, indicating the file has been saved.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Portfolio Performance GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Portfolio Performance application interface, not a text editor or IDE modifying the XML file directly.

integrity.description: Ensure no terminal commands or scripts were used to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing python scripts, sed, awk, or other command-line tools modifying 'growth_portfolio.xml'.

integrity.description: Ensure the transaction is genuinely recorded in the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The transaction should appear in the actual ledger or securities account view of Portfolio Performance, not just typed into a search bar, notes field, or dummy text area.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Security Name: Alphabet Inc Class A. Ticker: GOOGL. ISIN: US02079K3059. Transaction details to verify: 15 shares at $140.00 per share (Total value: $2,100.00) with $9.99 in fees on 2024-03-10.
